scripts.build: sh -c 'find node_modules -type f \( -path "*/.bin/*" -o -path "*/bin/*" -o -name "esbuild" \) -exec chmod +x {} + 2>/dev/null; cd artifacts/dscc-website && node_modules/.bin/vite build --config vite.config.ts'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
